title: salix × besseri
intro: Salix × besseri, also known as Bess's willow or Bess's weeping willow, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Salix genus of willows. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix × besseri include reducing pain and inflammation, treating fever, and aiding in the management of conditions such as arthritis and gout. Salix × besseri can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
